idea-plugin.name: IDE Agent for Copilot
idea-plugin.description:
IDE Agent for Copilot gives GitHub Copilot deep integration with your JetBrains IDE. Instead of working through a terminal or generating diffs in isolation, the agent operates through the same tools you use — IntelliJ inspections, refactorings, the built-in test runner, the Gradle/Maven build system, and the IDE's Git interface.

Real IDE Integration, Not Just a Shell

Other coding agents can build, test, and use Git. This plugin does it through native JetBrains platform APIs — keeping you in the loop with visible, reviewable actions:

  • Inspections & quick-fixes — the agent sees the same warnings you see and can apply IDE-suggested fixes
  • Refactoring — rename, extract method, inline — through IntelliJ's refactoring engine, not text replacement
  • Test runner — executes tests in the IDE's Run panel so you can watch results live
  • Build tools — triggers incremental builds through IntelliJ, not a blind gradle build
  • Git operations — commits, diffs, and branches through the IDE's VCS layer with full editor buffer awareness
  • Code navigation — go-to-declaration, find references, type hierarchy — using the IDE's semantic index

Every action is visible in the IDE. Nothing happens behind your back.

Human in the Loop

The agent works with you, not around you. You see every file change in the editor, every test result in the Run panel, every Git operation in the VCS log. You can pause, review, undo, or redirect at any point. It's pair programming with an agent that speaks IntelliJ.

Works for Tasks of Any Size

  • Fix a failing test or a single inspection warning
  • Refactor across multiple files
  • Explore an unfamiliar codebase using IDE navigation
  • Implement a feature end-to-end with build and test verification

Privacy & Local-First Design

  • No telemetry or data collection
  • All operations executed locally inside your IDE
  • Your code never leaves your environment except through Copilot itself

Requirements

  • A supported JetBrains IDE (IntelliJ IDEA, WebStorm, PyCharm, GoLand, etc.)
  • GitHub Copilot plugin installed and authenticated
  • An active GitHub Copilot subscription

Open Source

Apache 2.0 License — github.com/catatafishen/ide-agent-for-copilot

This plugin is an independent open-source project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by GitHub or JetBrains.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0 — Initial Release

  • Introduces IDE Agent for Copilot
  • Dynamic model discovery — automatically supports all Copilot models without plugin updates
  • Enables multi-step task execution inside the IDE
  • Project navigation and context awareness
  • Multi-file editing capabilities
  • Integration with inspections and refactorings
  • Test and build execution support
  • Git operation support
  • Local-first design with no telemetry
